name: seo-geo-audit
description: Unified SEO and GEO audit workflow for technical health, content quality, trust, entity signals, off-site brand mentions, platform-specific AI readiness, and AI visibility. Supports homepage, site, and domain-level reviews.

metadata.minimum_permissions: direct page access by default; third-party search enrichment is optional and should be explicitly configured
metadata.data_access_policy: Private analytics, Search Console, crawl logs, and proprietary datasets are never assumed. The audit can proceed from observable site evidence alone.
